title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Volkswagen India Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Volkswagen India Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Tiruchirappalli location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Volkswagen India Logistics:
Volkswagen India Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Volkswagen India Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
